docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MONTOYA, NATALI PATEL, HARSH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF NATALIE MONTOYA APPEARED. DEFENDANT HARSH PATEL APPEARED. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DAWN PAYNE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,048.21 FILED BY MONTOYA, NATALI AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, HARSH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE $0 SERVED OCT-06-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, HARSH
DECLARATION OF UPDATED ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTOYA, NATALI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTOYA, NATALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, HARSH $2,048.21 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,098.21, EVIDENCE SHOWED DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT BY NOT HAVING HIS DOG ON LEASH WHEN IT BIT/ATTACKED PLAINTIFF'S DOG. BECAUSE HE DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN TO SHOW PLAINTIFF AGREED TO SETTLE THE MATTER FOR $2,000, HE IS LIABLE FOR THE REMAINING VET BILL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
